resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The local fixture supplies a boundary row for Promethease and SNPedia third-party interpretation context. It does not supply the validated model, source-tool output, or authenticated Sequencing.com report content needed for personal conclusions.

thirdPartyToolContext.plainEnglishMeaning: Promethease is represented as an evidence-boundary package. It can summarize supplied local evidence and references, while marking unsupported personal conclusions unavailable.
thirdPartyToolContext.professionalReview: Use qualified professional review for clinical interpretation, variant follow-up, testing, screening, and treatment decisions; this synthetic local result is not enough for those decisions.

professionalReview: Use this local result as educational context for Promethease and SNPedia third-party interpretation context, not as a decision tool.
Collect validated source output, source provenance, and relevant clinical or professional context before using Promethease for personal decisions.
Discuss clinical interpretation, variant follow-up, testing, screening, and treatment decisions with qualified professionals when those choices matter.

Report unavailable Promethease and SNPedia lookup context evidence explicitly; do not recreate Promethease, copy proprietary ranking or magnitude logic, convert SNPedia literature matches into diagnosis, pathogenicity classification, medical triage, disease risk, treatment action, all-clear reassurance, or clinical actionability.
uncertainty: No validated Promethease and SNPedia third-party interpretation context model with source provenance and professional review is supplied for this local package.
The supplied rows support evidence-boundary education only and should not be treated as a personal prediction or clinical interpretation.
limitations: This validation result uses selected derived evidence only; raw genome data, VCF, FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, and complete callset files are not included.
The package does not recreate unavailable Sequencing.com authenticated report rows or proprietary third-party output for Promethease.
The package does not support: Promethease report recreation; SNPedia row imitation; pathogenicity classification; diagnosis; medical actionability; testing or treatment recommendation.
